data.body: VALIDATION FINDINGS: (LOCAL) signs+attributes correctly — fresh write stamped author_id=594c; with SSM key configured, verify-identity=2 verified/0 bad-sig. BUT signing NOT automatic for new sessions (identity.signing_key unset; only attribution is automatic via git-email). (CI) canary post-land write b60999693 is ATTRIBUTED (author_id=594c) but UNSIGNED (author_sig absent, no could-not-sign warning) — the $GITHUB_ENV-exported REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY (from my 1787/9e76 materialize steps) is not reaching the rebar write steps -> CI ticket ops unsigned. (SSM) real key stored in the declared param via put-parameter (Version 1, real key, works); Terraform drift: param exists+unmanaged -> apply must IMPORT (not recreate, which would clobber to CHANGEME). Plan: fix CI wiring (job-level env REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY), land, re-validate signed CI write, THEN close 1787/297d/epic signed. NOT closing signed on false CI evidence.
